title: Portable distribution, updater, and release validation
description: Umbrella for cross-platform portable distribution: portable artifacts, GitHub/local-zip updater flow, platform validation, Vision manifest-only connector staging, update-manifest + delta bundles, build-hash injection, release notes. DONE 2026-06-10 with the 1.0.0 first public release (commit 330e33d). All 3 platforms (Windows x64, Linux x64, macOS arm64) install + run + bootstrap the engine + generate, built per-OS via private mpi-ci. Updater validated: OFFLINE on all 3 (incl. mac version-first folder MPI-62); ONLINE on Windows+Linux end-to-end and to the GitHub-API boundary on macOS (blocked there only by a shared rental-IP rate limit, not a code bug). macOS launcher resolved to start.command + Terminal `xattr` quarantine clear (the no-terminal .app and setup.command were both tried + dropped — see MPI-63 + project_v1_release_complete memory). MPI-66 fixed the Windows baseline-filename mismatch (win32 vs windows) before release. 1.0.0 ships FULL installs only (no update bundles for the first release). NOTE: 1.0.0 itself was NOT re-tested on Mac hardware (rentamac subscription ended after the 0.0.12 mac acceptance); 1.0.0 is mechanically identical to the M4-validated 0.0.12 (same launcher/updater/code, version strings only + the win32 baseline rename which does not affect the full install), so it is safe by equivalence. Deferred non-blockers: signed/notarized no-terminal mac .app (needs paid Apple Developer account); per-workflow VAE fp16 banding on MPS (MPI-61).
